name: The Chief Golf Course
about: The Chief Golf Course, known as 'The Spirit of the North,' is a premier golf destination in Northern Michigan that combines traditional play with modern simulation technology. The venue offers a full 18-hole golf course alongside simulator facilities, providing options for on-course play and all-weather practice. It caters to both traditional golfers and those seeking a high-tech indoor experience, supported by a pro shop and event hosting capabilities. The facility is designed to create a complete golf day experience, with dedicated simulator bays, food and beverage options, and opportunities for both individual play and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for accurate simulation
Comprehensive amenities including bar and grill for full experience
Versatile space suitable for both practice and social events

food_and_drink.notes: On-site bar and grill with restaurant options
Full bar service available at the Pelican's Nest restaurant

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based simulator system for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs for simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks may not be permitted as the venue has an on-site bar and grill.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes approximately 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Chief Golf Course is family-friendly and welcomes junior golfers.
